plugins.name: nexusfeed-ltl
plugins.description: Real-time LTL freight carrier fuel surcharge rates for AI agents. 11 carriers (ODFL, Saia, Estes, ABF, R+L, TForce, XPO, SEFL, Averitt, FedEx, UPS), verifiable provenance on every response.

plugins.name: nexusfeed-abc
